description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a dark gable roof and light-colored exterior walls, likely clad in wood or siding. The structure features a prominent main section and a smaller attached wing, both surrounded by a landscaped yard with several trees and bushes. The front facade includes a covered entryway, possibly a small porch, and multiple windows that provide natural light. The roof is steeply pitched, typical of traditional bungalow styles, and the overall footprint is rectangular with a modest extension. The property is bordered by a paved driveway and walkways, suggesting easy access for vehicles and pedestrians. The landscaping is well-maintained, with trees strategically placed for shade and privacy.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof, light exterior walls, and landscaped surroundings, featuring a covered entry and multiple windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and landscaped yard with trees and bushes.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable end, driveway, and additional landscaping elements.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, roofline, and more densely grouped trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the secondary entrance and symmetrical window arrangement.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side windows
